notes: IA cleanup — intake migration + NOW tile rationalization. (1) Removed three duplicate-nav tiles from NOW: SCAN (has its own tab), OPTICS (lives in BUILD subtab and KNOW), and INTAKE (moved to BUILD). DEPLOY tile stays — it serves as status+shortcut (shows 'No active pod' / active deployment subtitle). (2) Added a + INTAKE button to the BUILD -> DEPLOY page header (between + RACK and + NEW). Tapping it opens the same intake_open() modal — same file-drop / parse / dispatch flow, just one canonical home. Mental model the floor tech ends up holding: MASTER = site, BUILD = job, NOW = shift, SCAN = tool, KNOW = reference. MASTER<->SITE-subtab consolidation deferred to v1.6.45 (different code paths — MASTER is cabinet/host CSV, SITE subtab is platform/PDU profile editor; merge needs more care). Builds on v1.6.43.
